svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="三种同步策略" id="ssot-strategies"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="-143" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="520" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="h" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value=".agents/skills/foo/ (真实内容)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="400" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="策略一：symlink" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="200" x="70" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="策略二：指针文件" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="200" x="440" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="策略三：受控副本" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="200" x="810" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value=".cursor/commands/foo.md →
(软链接，跟随解析)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="50" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value=".codex/skills/foo (文件)
内容: /abs/path/.agents/skills/foo" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="420" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value=".trae/commands/foo.md
(脚本生成的副本，禁手改)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="790" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="c1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.2;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="h"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="c2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="h"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="c3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.8;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="h"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="✅ 零同步成本
✅ 改源即生效
⚠ Windows 需开发者模式
⚠ 部分 IDE 缓存需重启" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="50" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="✅ 对 IDE 透明
✅ 适合不认软链的 IDE
⚠ 路径是绝对路径
⚠ 换机器需重跑初始化" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="420" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="✅ 兼容所有 IDE
⚠ 副本会过期
⚠ 必须 hook 兜底
⚠ 文件头标注自动生成" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="790" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cap" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="适用：Cursor / Trae / Reasonix 适用：Codex 适用：不认软链的 IDE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="900" x="100" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
